questions.prompt: What do guests book — rooms, tables, services, or experiences?
Who operates the calendar — single provider, team, or multi-location staff?
Deposit, full payment, or pay-on-arrival? Any refund rules?
Any regulated data or regional privacy constraints?
Existing PMS, channel manager, or accounting tools to integrate?
What does success look like in 90 days (bookings, occupancy, revenue)?
